headline: CSX (CSX) Is Upgrading Radnor Yard To Cut Manual Switching
summary: CSX (NasdaqGS:CSX) is upgrading its Radnor Yard in Nashville with additional power-operated switches. The project focuses on reducing manual switching, improving yard control, and supporting safer train movements. The infrastructure work is part of CSX's broader push to modernize operations and yard management. CSX is a major freight railroad company in the eastern United States, and Radnor Yard is an important hub in its network. Rail operators have been putting more attention on...
